sections.title: Performance Analysis Complete
sections.content:
The performance-engineer agent has completed a comprehensive analysis of the Zana codebase and identified **31 optimization opportunities** with estimated overall improvements of:

- **50-75% reduction** in file I/O operations
- **40-60% improvement** in API response times  
- **30-50% reduction** in memory footprint
- **2-5x throughput increase** for high-concurrency workloads

sections.title: 1. **Ticket Store N+1 Reads** - `packages/core/src/ticket-store.ts:120-149`
sections.content:
**Problem**: Every `listTickets()` call reads ALL ticket files individually.  
**Solution**: Use existing `_index.json` for metadata, lazy-load full details.  
**Impact**: 50-100x speedup for filtered queries.

sections.title: 2. **Profile Store N+1 Reads** - `packages/core/src/profile-store.ts:18-74`
sections.content:
**Problem**: Scans and reads ALL profile files on every call.  
**Solution**: Cache profiles in memory with 60s TTL.  
**Impact**: 100x speedup for repeated calls.

sections.title: 3. **Ticket Index Full Rebuild** - `packages/core/src/ticket-store.ts:179`
sections.content:
**Problem**: Every save regenerates the entire index.  
**Solution**: Update index incrementally.  
**Impact**: 50-100x faster saves.

sections.title: 4. **Event Bus Subscribers O(n) Removal** - `packages/core/src/event-bus-service.ts:74-79`
sections.content:
**Problem**: Array filter on every unsubscribe.  
**Solution**: Use Map for O(1) removal.  
**Impact**: Prevents memory leak and O(n) churn.

sections.title: 5. **Event Store Full File Reads** - `packages/core/src/event-bus-store.ts:38-77`
sections.content:
**Solution**: Keep recent 1000 events in memory cache.  
**Impact**: 20-50x speedup for recent queries.

sections.title: 6. **Profile Lookup O(n)** - `packages/core/src/profile-store.ts:76-79`
sections.content:
**Solution**: Add Map-based ID lookup.  
**Impact**: 10-30x faster lookups.

sections.title: 7. **SSE Client Memory Leak** - `packages/core/src/sse-broadcaster.ts:34-56`
sections.content:
**Solution**: Add periodic cleanup for destroyed connections.  
**Impact**: Prevents unbounded memory growth.

sections.title: Medium Priority
sections.content:
- Vector memory batched IDF updates (10-20x for burst writes)
- HTTP response caching with ETags (30-50% API CPU reduction)
- Module manifest caching with mtime checks (2-5x faster daemon restarts)
- File watcher cleanup in background workers
- Pre-computed vector magnitudes (10-20% faster searches)

sections.title: Complete Report
sections.content:
The full analysis includes:
- 14 detailed optimization recommendations with code examples
- Specific file:line references for each issue
- Before/after code comparisons
- Performance impact estimates
- Concurrency issue warnings
- Priority matrix for implementation order

All 10 core files requiring changes have been identified:
- `ticket-store.ts`, `profile-store.ts`, `event-bus-store.ts`, `event-bus-service.ts`
- `vector-memory.ts`, `sse-broadcaster.ts`, `background-workers.ts`, `agent-manager.ts`
- `api-server.ts`, `module-loader.ts`

Would you like me to implement any of these optimizations? I recommend starting with the 4 critical issues for immediate impact.

rawOutputPreview:
# Performance Analysis Complete

The performance-engineer agent has completed a comprehensive analysis of the Zana codebase and identified **31 optimization opportunities** with estimated overall improvements of:

- **50-75% reduction** in file I/O operations
- **40-60% improvement** in API response times  
- **30-50% reduction** in memory footprint
- **2-5x throughput increase** for high-concurrency workloads

## Critical Issues (Implement First)

### 1. **Ticket Store N+1 Reads** - `packages/core/src/ticket-store.ts:120-149`
**Problem**: Every `listTickets()` call reads ALL ticket files individually.  
**Solution**: Use existing `_index.json` for metadata, lazy-load full details.  
**Impact**: 50-100x speedup for filtered queries.

### 2. **Profile Store N+1 Reads** - `packages/core/src/profile-store.ts:18-74`
**Problem**: Scans and reads ALL profile files on every call.  
**Solution**: Cache profiles in memory with 60s TTL.  
**Impact**: 100x speedup for repeated calls.

### 3. **Ticket Index Full Rebuild** - `packages/core/src/ticket-store.ts:179`
**Problem**: Every save regenerates the entire index.  
**Solution**: Update index incrementally.  
**Impact**: 50-100x faster saves.

### 4. **Event Bus Subscribers O(n) Removal** - `packages/core/src/event-bus-service.ts:74-79`
**Problem**: Array filter on every unsubscribe.  
**Solution**: Use Map for O(1) removal.  
**Impact**: Prevents memory leak and O(n) churn.

## High Priority Issues

### 5. **Event Store Full File Reads** - `packages/core/src/event-bus-store.ts:38-77`
**Solution**: Keep recent 1000 events in memory cache.  
**Impact**: 20-50x speedup for recent queries.

### 6. **Profile Lookup O(n)** - `packages/core/src/profile-store.ts:76-79`
**Solution**: Add Map-based ID lookup.  
**Impact**: 10-30x faster lookups.

### 7. **SSE Client Memory Leak** - `packages/core/src/sse-broadcaster.ts:34-56`
**Solution**: Add periodic cleanup for destroyed connections.  
**Impact**: Prevents unbounded memory growth.
